title: Piernas de seda
director: John Boland, Enrique de Rosas, Miguel de Zárraga
writer: José López Rubio, Frederica Sagor Maas, Paul Perez
actors: Rosita Moreno, Raul Roulien, Enrique de Rosas
plot: When singer Frank Alton is late for work at a radio station in New York, Conroy, the manager, fires him. Without Frank on the program, Ninón Silk Stockings, the show's sponsor, begins to lose sales. The president of the company, J...
